name: Replimune Group, Inc.
business: Replimune Group, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel oncolytic immunotherapies based on its proprietary RPx platform. The company's lead product candidate, RP1, is being developed in combination with nivolumab for the treatment of advanced melanoma. The company has not generated any revenue from product sales and does not have any approved products.

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary oncolytic immunotherapy product candidates are designed and intended to maximally activate the immune system against cancer.

catalysts.event: FDA action date for BLA resubmission of RP1 in combination with nivolumab for advanced melanoma
catalysts.sentence: On June 26, 2026 we announced the FDA accepted the BLA resubmission as a Class 1 resubmission with an action date of August 2, 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA advisory committee meeting for RP1 BLA
catalysts.sentence: The FDA also stated that they would convene an advisory committee meeting in late July 2026.
